findings.message: Cached denial check returns immediately without verifying if the user's permissions have been updated since the denial was cached
findings.suggestion: Consider adding cache invalidation logic or TTL checks to ensure cached denials don't persist when user permissions are modified

findings.message: Cache miss fallback logic creates asymmetric behavior where cached permissions are trusted immediately but denial cache bypasses all permission verification
findings.suggestion: Ensure consistent authorization flow where both cached allows and cached denials follow the same validation pattern, or add explicit cache invalidation on permission changes

findings.message: Test explicitly sets permCache to false but expects denial cache to take precedence, which may not reflect real authorization scenarios where permissions could be updated
findings.suggestion: Add test cases that verify cache invalidation behavior when permissions change from deny to allow
